subcodes.first_line: Should thy sojourn in Iraq prove arduous unto thee, then return, trusting in God, unto thine own land or other regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر توقف در عراق صعبست بر آنجناب متوکلا علی الله راجع بارض خود و دیار اخری
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @scarcity of receptive souls
